name: Horizontal Cylindrical / Rectangular High-Pressure Steam Sterilizers
description: Industrial-grade autoclaves for CSSD departments, designed for high-volume sterilization cycles with precision temperature and pressure control.

name: High-Speed 'Flash' Steam Sterilizers
description: Specialized units for rapid sterilization of surgical instruments between procedures, minimizing OT downtime and ensuring instrument readiness.

name: Vertical Autoclaves
description: Space-efficient vertical sterilizers ideal for laboratories, clinics, and smaller CSSD units with full regulatory compliance.

name: Bedpan / Bowl & Utensil Sterilizers
description: Dedicated sterilization systems for patient-care utensils, supporting infection control in ward and ICU environments.

name: Hot & Cold-Water Pressure Sterilizers
description: Pressure sterilization systems using hot and cold-water cycles for specialized medical and laboratory applications.

name: Bio Medical Waste Sanitizers
description: Biomedical-waste treatment systems for safe sanitization in accordance with applicable healthcare waste-management requirements.

name: Tabletop Sterilization Units
description: Compact bench-top autoclaves for dental clinics, small operating theatres, and outpatient surgical centres.

name: CSSD Furniture & Equipment Trolleys
description: Stainless-steel CSSD workstations, instrument trolleys, and storage solutions designed for sterile-processing workflows.
